those substances that are ascribed to that planet, profession
appropriate to it, the special effects of the Bhava, and Rasi
occupied or aspected by it and the effects of the special Yogas
produced by it. The measure of these things depends on the
strength of the planet concerned. You know that people some-
times change their taste. For example, a man who is fond of
sweets at one time prefers pungent things at another period. What
is the reason for this ? It is the Dasa that is responsible for it.
Similarly a person who was lean in the beginning becomes stout
at a later stage. Some persons prefer certain Deities at one
time and certain others at another.
Let us suppose that the Da§a of a malefic planet is in progress.
Then sets in the sub-period of another malefic. What would be
the effects of this period ? They would be pretty dangerous.
